015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
027
028/**
029 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link SoapXmlSerializer}.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
033 * </ul>
034 *
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
038   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
039   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
040})
041public class SoapXmlSerializerSession extends XmlSerializerSession {
042
043   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
044   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
045
046   /**
047    * Builder class.
048    */
049   public static class Builder extends XmlSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
050
051      private SoapXmlSerializer ctx;
052
053      /**
054       * Constructor
055       *
056       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
057       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
058       */
059      protected Builder(SoapXmlSerializer ctx) {
060         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
061         this.ctx = ctx;
062      }
063
064      @Override
065      public SoapXmlSerializerSession build() {
066         return new SoapXmlSerializerSession(this);
067      }
068
069   }
070
071   /**
072    * Creates a new builder for this object.
073    *
074    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
075    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
076    * @return A new builder.
077    */
078   public static Builder create(SoapXmlSerializer ctx) {
079      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
080   }
081
082   private final SoapXmlSerializer ctx;
083
084   /**
085    * Constructor.
086    *
087    * @param builder The builder for this object.
088    */
089   protected SoapXmlSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
090      super(builder);
091
092      ctx = builder.ctx;
093   }
094
095   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
096   public Map<String,String> getResponseHeaders() { return map("SOAPAction", getSoapAction()); }
097
098   /**
099    * The SOAPAction HTTP header value to set on responses.
100    *
101    * @see SoapXmlSerializer.Builder#soapAction(String)
102    * @return
103    *    The SOAPAction HTTP header value to set on responses.
104    */
105   public String getSoapAction() { return ctx.getSoapAction(); }
106
107   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
108   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
109      try (XmlWriter w = getXmlWriter(out)) {
110         // @formatter:off
111         w.append("<?xml")
112            .attr("version", "1.0")
113            .attr("encoding", "UTF-8")
114            .appendln("?>");
115         w.oTag("soap", "Envelope")
116            .attr("xmlns", "soap", getSoapAction())
117            .appendln(">");
118         w.sTag(1, "soap", "Body").nl(1);
119         indent += 2;
120         w.flush();
121         super.doSerialize(out, o);
122         w.ie(1).eTag("soap", "Body").nl(1);
123         w.eTag("soap", "Envelope").nl(0);
124         // @formatter:on
125      }
126   }
127}
